queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Wireshark' AND publisher = 'The Wireshark developer community, https://www.wireshark.org';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS ((SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Wireshark' AND publisher = 'The Wireshark developer community, https://www.wireshark.org') AND version_compare(version, '4.6.5') < 0);
